transcript:
Speaker A (AI): कल कहाँ गए थे? [Where did you go yesterday?] 
Speaker B (Human): I went to माल yesterday. 
Speaker A: माल? Pronunciation थोड़ा गड़बड़ हो गया। It is Mall. I went to the mall yesterday. कल क्या खाया? [Mall? Pronunciation is a bit off. It is Mall. I went to the mall yesterday. What did you eat yesterday?] 
Speaker B: I eat पीजा खाया। [I eat pizza ate.] 
Speaker A: पीजा? नहीं, Pizza. और बात कल की है इसलिए eat नहीं ate - I ate pizza. ट्रेन कहाँ से पकड़ते हो? [Pizza? No, Pizza. And since it's about yesterday, not 'eat' but 'ate' - I ate pizza. Where do you catch the train from?] 
Speaker B: I pick train from railway स्टेशन। [I pick train from railway station.] 
Speaker A: Pick? Pick मतलब उठाना। Train उठाओगे? Catch मतलब पकड़ना। और इस्टेशन नहीं, Station. I catch the train from the railway station. [Pick? Pick means to lift. Will you lift the train? Catch means to catch. And not 'istation', Station. I catch the train from the railway station.] 
Speaker B: ओहो, मेरा pronunciation weak है। [Oh, my pronunciation is weak.] 
Speaker A: कोई बात नहीं, AI Teacher ट्राई किया क्या? [No problem, did you try AI Teacher?] 
Speaker B: वो महंगा होगा ना? [That will be expensive, right?] 
Speaker A: बिलकुल नहीं, normal English classes से 7 गुना सस्ता है। इसलिए 50 लाख लोग MySivi पर प्रैक्टिस कर रहे हैं। [Not at all, it is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 50 lakh people are practicing on MySivi.] 
Speaker B: लेकिन टाइम नहीं मिलता। [But I don't get time.] 
Speaker A: रोज़ सिर्फ 15 से 20 मिनट प्रैक्टिस काफी है। धीरे-धीरे confident हो जाओगे। [Just 15 to 20 minutes of practice daily is enough. Slowly you will become confident.] 
Speaker B: वाओ, कैसे ज्वाइन करूँ? [Wow, how do I join?] 
Speaker A: नीचे install का बटन दबाओ, MySivi app install करो, sign up करो और प्रैक्टिस शुरू करो। सिर्फ 15 दिनों में improvement दिखने लगेगा। ट्रायल सिर्फ ₹1 में 3 दिनों के लिए है। अभी शुरू करो। [Press the install button below, install MySivi app, sign up and start practicing. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. Trial is for just ₹1 for 3 days. Start now.]

pronunciation

eat नहीं ate - [not eat, ate -]
I ate pizza

I pick train from railway स्टेशन [I pick train from railway station]
Pick मतलब उठाना... [Pick means to lift...]
train उठाओगे? [will you lift the train?]

और ईस्टेशन नहीं [and not 'eestation']

ओह मेरा प्रोनान्सिएशन वीक है [Oh my pronunciation is weak]

summary: A young woman practices her English speaking skills with an AI robot tutor on a video call. The AI tutor gently corrects her pronunciation and grammar mistakes, highlighting the benefits of the MySivi app. The ad concludes with a call to action to install the app and start a 3-day trial for just ₹1.
